title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
